task: Get a quote from C and above-rated solar energy equipment company within 10 miles of Miami, Florida.
graderReasoning: The agent successfully found a qualifying BBB-listed solar energy equipment company using the BBB search results filtered to Miami, FL and within <10 miles. Evidence shows the 10-mile filter was applied ('Applied filters: < 10 Miles', 13 results). Among the visible qualifying businesses, Goldin Solar, LLC appears as 'Solar Energy Equipment Dealers' with BBB Rating A+ and a visible 'Get a Quote' link. The agent opened the quote page for Goldin Solar, LLC, reaching the correct BBB quote form URL. On that form, the agent filled the service ZIP code (33101) and a project description, and selected the email-only contact option, which revealed the required personal-info fields (email and first/last name). Because BBB requires real personal contact information to submit, and the user did not provide usable details, reaching the prepared submission form with the correct company and preconditions satisfies the task under the personal-information-wall rule. The later observation that the quote page listed a Vero Beach address does not negate success, because the BBB search results explicitly showed Goldin Solar in the filtered '< 10 Miles' result state and the quote form was reached from that qualifying result.
final_result_response:
I found an eligible BBB-listed company and prepared the quote form:

- Company: Goldin Solar, LLC
- Category: Solar Energy Equipment Dealers
- BBB rating: A+
- BBB search filter used: within 10 miles of Miami, FL
- Quote form filled with zip 33101 and solar equipment request details

Blocked: BBB requires a real first/last name and email address. I don’t have my own inbox or personal email to use, and I can’t invent contact info for a quote request.

If you provide a name and email, I can submit it.
action_history: Opening BBB: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.bbb.org/');
Searching BBB for solar companies near Miami: await page.locator('e11').fill('solar energy equipment');
Searching BBB for solar companies near Miami: await page.locator('e13').fill('Miami, FL');
Searching BBB for solar companies near Miami: await page.locator('e17').click();
Opening quote request for Goldin Solar: await page.locator('e53').click();
Starting quote form details: await page.locator('f3e2').fill('33101');

Starting quote form details: await page.locator('f3e3').fill('I would like a quote for solar energy equipment for a property in Miami, FL. Please provide available options, estimated pricing, and next steps.');
Selecting email-only contact preference: await page.locator('f3e6').click();
Proceeding to next quote step: await page.locator('f3e6').click();
Proceeding to next quote step: await page.locator('f3e12').click();
Trying to select contact preference: await page.locator('f3e7').click({force:true});
Selecting email-only via form control: await quoteFrame1.locator('#contactmethod-email').click({force:true});
Selecting email-only option directly: await quoteFrame1.locator('#contactmethod-email').evaluate(el => el.click());
Checking for saved contact autofill: await page.locator('f3e14').click();
